title: Woman found deceased in Rosedale home
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The authorities are investigating the death of a woman in Rosedale, Pacaltsdorp.


> Her employer reportedly discovered her body at her residence in Adam Street this morning, 17 November, after she had failed to show up for work.


The woman, who reportedly lived alone and worked in the healthcare sector, has not yet officially been identified. Family members have raised concerns that her death may not have been due to natural causes.

The Southern Cape Police’s spokesperson, Sergeant Chris Spies, confirmed that the police are on the scene and that an investigation is under way.

This is a developing story, and further updates will be provided as more information becomes available.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
